headline: Assessing Southern Company (SO) Valuation After Landmark US$26.54b Department Of Energy Loan Approval
summary: The U.S. Department of Energy’s approval of a $26.54b loan package for Southern (SO) is a major financing event, supporting large grid projects, expanded capacity, and multi year customer bill savings. See our latest analysis for Southern. Southern’s latest moves sit against a backdrop of firm share price momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 7.85% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 12.74%, building on a 95.19% total shareholder return over five years. If this kind of grid...

headline: Who is really footing the AI energy bill? Inside the debate about data center electricity costs
summary: The hyperscalers racing to build the data centers needed for the AI boom have a PR crisis on their hands, but the industry is not taking the problem lying down.
